compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add integration research step to preplanning SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Add an integration research step to plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md after story decomposition (Phase 1) and before adversarial review (Phase 2.5).

**New section: Phase 2.25: Integration Research**

Add between Phase 2 (Risk & Scope Scan) and Phase 2.5 (Adversarial Review):

A story qualifies for integration research if it references any of: third-party CLI tools, external APIs/services, CI/CD workflow changes, infrastructure provisioning, data format migrations, or authentication/credential flows.

For each qualifying story:
1. Use WebSearch to find known-working code that uses the specific integration
2. Verify specific capabilities claimed by the story scope
3. Add findings to the story Considerations as 'Verified Integration Constraints'
4. If no sandbox is available for integration testing, flag to the user
5. If research finds no verified code or capabilities, flag story as high-risk and recommend spike-task creation

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md — Edit

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Integration research section exists in preplanning
  Verify: grep -qi 'integration research' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Section references WebSearch
  Verify: grep -qi 'websearch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Section references Verified Integration Constraints
  Verify: grep -q 'Verified Integration Constraints' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_preplanning_integration_research.py --tb=short -q

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
